name: Xilonen
occupation: Cult Leader of the Reborn Sun
personality: Fanatical, charismatic, utterly devoted to the Olman gods
motivation: Complete the ritual to awaken Tlaloc and bring the Olman empire back to power
fear: That the old ways will be forgotten and the Olman gods will fade away
secret: The ritual requires a blood sacrifice from someone of pure Olman blood - he has been breeding cultists for this purpose
knows: The full layout of the shrine
The true nature of the Olman King's mummy
willShare: Nothing - he will die before betraying the cult
mannerisms: Gestures broadly when speaking of the gods, eyes gleam with fanaticism
notes: Main antagonist. Willing to die for his cause. Speaks in grand, prophetic terms.
